form.formComment: Comes off a 42 day let-up. Most recently ran last of 8 at Sapphire Coast Bm66 on March 1 over 1200m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Jazz All Knight with 57kg at $10. The race before that won by a long-neck at Braidwood Cl2 February 7 over 1350m defeating Ginjari with 59.5kg at $3.50. Has to improve a lot to match these.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 43-day let-up.
